## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m compileall .`
- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `mypy agents scripts tests`
- [ ] `bandit -r agents scripts`
- [ ] `npm run design:lint`

## Security Review

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No unsafe external execution
- [ ] No unauthorized scanning or offensive behavior
- [ ] Human approval required for destructive actions

## STICHES/DESIGN.md Review

- [ ] Documentation follows `DESIGN.md`
- [ ] Dashboard/UI changes follow design tokens
- [ ] Governance warnings remain visible

## Codex Review

```text
@codex review
```
